positive: Symmetrical, detailed central composition featuring stylized deep-sea biomechanical flora and fauna integrated with cosmic nebula patterns. The main subject is a magnificent, bioluminescent jellyfish mixed with geometric, celestial mandalas. Style should be a blend of detailed scientific illustration, Art Nouveau line work, and glowing psychedelia. Use high contrast, emphasizing silhouettes and negative space. Color palette: deep indigo, sapphire blue, emerald green, and ethereal gold accents. The composition must be clean, graphic, and highly suitable for repeat printing on apparel. Intricate detail, clean edges, cinematic glow effect, vector illustration quality, high saturation.
negative: blurry, amateur, grainy, noisy, jpeg artifacts, watermark, text, writing, signature, cropped, out of frame, extra limbs, fused fingers, bad anatomy, low resolution, dull colors
